meaning: n.摇石(指受到轻微触动即发生摇动的平衡状态的大石)
examples: A memorial service was held yesterday; the Rev. Michael Logan officiated.
The aircraft made an unscheduled landing at Logan after developing an electrical fault.
Again he looked at Logan, raised his eyebrows and gave her a big smile.
Kelly Johnson then put Tampa Bay up 2-1 on a single off Boone Logan.
Finally, some Egyptian soldiers fought their way through the crowd with batons, Logan said.
